heading: Omitted
label: 493 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized the Secretary of Agriculture to furnish young trees free from the Nebraska National Forest to homestead settlers, was from the Department of Agriculture Appropriation Act, 1927, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:act May 11, 1926, ch. 28644 Stat. 514, .Feb. 10, 1925, ch. 20043 Stat. 835, .June 5, 1924, ch. 26643 Stat. 445, .Feb. 26, 1923, ch. 11942 Stat. 1304, .May 11, 1922, ch. 18542 Stat. 520The Nebraska National Forest, Niobrara division, was redesignated the Samuel R. McKelvie National Forest by , , .Pub. L. 92–14285 Stat. 393Oct. 15, 1971
